name: Holdout / Calibration Set
description: Reserved default subset for cleaner cross-model comparison and future public reporting. Disjoint from the starter slice; instruction-ambiguity cases are excluded from the default holdout and can be added through an explicit run config when manual review is desired.
selection_rationale: Picks trailing or reserved cases from each default family so the starter slice can evolve at the head of the dataset without colliding with reserved evaluation cases. Goal-grounding (GG-07, GG-08), classic-riddle override (CR-07, CR-08), temporal-state (TW-07, TW-08), and pronoun-resolution (PR-06, PR-07) take their last two entries. Social-pragmatic uses SP-08, SP-09, physical-commonsense uses MC-09, MC-10, and literal-precision uses LP-31, LP-32 for whimsical object-function traps. Instruction-ambiguity is intentionally omitted for now because those hybrid/manual-review cases should be opt-in on top of the default set.
